title: Amischophacelus axillaris

The classification of Amischophacelus axillaris includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its order as Asterales. Within the family Asteraceae, it belongs to the tribe Inuleae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships to other plants.
